examples: Aim To reval the virulence variation related to vacuolating cytotoxicity of coccoid Helicobacter pylori.
OBJECTIVE to explore whether the coccoid formed by Bifidobacterium under the unfavorable conditions belongs to the bacterial cryptic growth cells.
Objective:To understand the effect of coccoid Helicobacter pylori on proliferation of gastric carcinoma epithelial line SGC-7901 cultured in vitro.
